evals.prompt: Write a GitHub Actions CI workflow for a Node.js project. It should run on push and pull_request to main, install dependencies with npm ci, and run npm test. Use actions/checkout and actions/setup-node.
evals.expected_output: A .github/workflows/ci.yml file that uses the latest versions of actions/checkout and actions/setup-node with correct major-version tags (e.g. @v4), verified via gh CLI.

assertions.description: actions/checkout uses a @vN major-version tag, not a SHA
actions/setup-node uses a @vN major-version tag, not a SHA

evals.prompt:
Review and update this workflow file to use the latest action versions:

name: CI
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
        with:
          version: latest
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v4
        with:
          push: false
evals.expected_output: Updated workflow where actions/checkout and actions/setup-python use the latest major-version tags, and docker/setup-buildx-action and docker/build-push-action are pinned to full commit SHAs with version comments (e.g. @<sha>  # v3.0.0).

assertions.description: actions/checkout@v2 is replaced with a newer version
docker/setup-buildx-action is pinned to a SHA (40 hex chars after @)
docker/setup-buildx-action SHA line has a # v version comment
docker/build-push-action is pinned to a SHA

evals.prompt: I'm setting up a workflow that deploys to AWS. Add a step to configure AWS credentials using aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials. The role ARN is arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/my-github-role and the region is ap-northeast-1.
evals.expected_output: A workflow step using aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials pinned to a full commit SHA with a version comment, not a floating tag.

assertions.description: The role ARN is included in the step
The AWS region ap-northeast-1 is included
